Notice Of Motion For Order Charging Partnership And Limited Liablility Company
Off Calendar May-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven A. Simontacchi, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: IMAT, LLC
Jeffrey S. Rosen, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Hitendra S. Sinh

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff IMAT, LLC's motion for an order charging partnership and limited liability company interests.
The Court has read and considered the late-filed declaration in opposition to the motion. The request for a continuance is denied. Plaintiff's motion for an order charging partnership and limited liability company interests is granted. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion For Order Charging Partnership And Limited Liablility Company
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Continued To May-29-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff IMAT LLC's motion for order charging partnership and limited liability is continued to May 29, 2007 at 10:30 a.m. in Dept. 610, at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Steven Simontacchi, Esq. for Plaintiff: IMAT, LLC a California Limited Liability Company. Plaintiff's witness: Pilip Patel, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Hitendra A. Sinh, as follows:
Total Damages of $202,367.68 including interest, attorney fees, and costs.
Judgment signed in open court.
